label: Do Not Honor
description: Issuer has blocked this card for unspecified reasons

label: Invalid Card Number
description: Card PAN failed Luhn check or is not on file

label: Insufficient Funds
description: Available balance is below the transaction amount

label: Incorrect PIN
description: PIN entered does not match issuer record

label: Transaction Not Permitted
description: Transaction type not allowed for this card

label: Restricted Card
description: Card is on a restriction list (lost, stolen, fraud)

label: Chip Read Error
description: Terminal could not read chip — try swipe fallback

label: Bank Unavailable
description: Issuer host is unreachable — offline auth may apply

label: System Error
description: Acquirer or network system error — not card related
